SQLScript:
WITH EligibleMemberData AS(
	SELECT DISTINCT
			COALESCE(nullif(mpb.UniquePersonKey,'None'),nullif(mpb.PlanMemberID,'None')) AS MemberID
			,COALESCE(nullif(ompb.UniquePersonKey,'None'),nullif(ompb.PlanMemberID,'None')) AS OriginalMemberID
	FROM MemberPersonBridge mpb
			JOIN HedisEligibleMember hem
					ON mpb.BISInternalPersonId = hem.BISInternalPersonId
			LEFT JOIN MemberPersonBridge ompb
					ON ompb.BISInternalPersonId = hem.BISInternalPersonId
					AND ompb.IsOriginalMemberId = 1
)
,MaxFileID AS (
	SELECT MAX(FileID) AS MaxFileID
	FROM Pharmacy
	WHERE FileLayoutID IN (38000)
)
SELECT DISTINCT emd.OriginalMemberID AS MemberID
	,p.RXDaysSupply AS DaysSupply
	,date_format(p.RxFillDate,'yyyyMMdd') AS ServiceDate
	,p.NDCCodeSTD AS NDCDrugCode
	,CASE ClaimStatus
		WHEN 'I' THEN '1'
		WHEN 'D' THEN '2'
		WHEN 'A' THEN '3'
		WHEN 'P' THEN '3'
		WHEN 'R' THEN '4'
		END AS ClaimStatus
	,CAST(p.Quantity AS STRING) AS QuantityDispensed
	,'N' AS SupplementalData
	,p.SourceName AS DataSourceName
	,p.ProviderID
	,p.ProviderNPI 
	,p.PharmacyNPI
	,p.ClaimNumber AS ClaimID
	,'1' AS ClaimLineID
	,p.AdjudicationDate AS AdditionalColumn1
	,p.AlternateKey1 AS AdditionalColumn2
	,p.AlternateKey2 AS AdditionalColumn3
	,'' AS AdditionalColumn4
	,'' AS AdditionalColumn5
	,'' AS Filler
,current_timestamp() AS LoadDateTime
FROM Pharmacy p
	JOIN MaxFileID mfid ON p.FileID = mfid.MaxFileID
	JOIN EligibleMemberData emd ON IfNUll(p.PlanMemberID, p.UniquePersonKey) = emd.MemberID
